user_prompt: User is asking about cancellation. Walk them through the cancel flow without being defensive.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM  
**Category:** Billing - Cancellation Request  

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand if this isn't the right fit for you right now—thanks for letting us know. Canceling is straightforward, and I'll walk you through it step by step.

**To cancel your subscription:**
1. Log in to your account at [app.yourservice.com/login](https://app.yourservice.com/login).
2. Go to **Settings** > **Billing** (or **Subscription** tab).
3. Scroll to the bottom and click **Cancel Subscription**.
4. Follow the prompts to confirm—your access will continue until the end of your current billing period.

If you run into any issues or prefer I handle it for you, just reply with "cancel for me" and your account email, and I'll take care of it right away (no questions asked).

Before you go, is there anything we could improve to change your mind? No pressure either way—we appreciate your feedback.

Let me know how it goes or if you need help!  

Best,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions perfectly by categorizing the ticket and providing a clear, empathetic, and non-defensive walkthrough of the cancellation process as requested.
